doctrines.name: non-maleficence
doctrines.description: Do not cause harm to individuals or society through actions or inactions.

doctrines.name: autonomy
doctrines.description: Respect the right of individuals to make informed, self-determined decisions.

doctrines.name: justice
doctrines.description: Ensure fair and equitable treatment for all individuals without bias or discrimination.

doctrines.name: beneficence
doctrines.description: Act in the best interest of individuals and society to promote well-being.

doctrines.name: transparency
doctrines.description: Operate openly and honestly, with traceable and auditable decision-making processes.
